description: If Black can win any ko what can he get in this situation? Thanks to Bass, kaf, BartTM and tails for pointing out an errors with the problem. It's now in the sandbox area because it sucks.

Black plays and gets a...FORCE]AW[ha]AW[hb]LB[gf:Gote]LB[gg:life]AP[goproblems]
(;B[cf];W[cg]LB[ba:A];B[ba]
(;W[db]C[This is the old solution. Thanks to BartTM for pointing out the error in my ways.]
(;B[cb];W[da]C[White made a mistake and Black got a sente seki. Later A can be used as a ko threat.]LB[eb:A])
(;B[ca]C[Black just killed himself in gote! What were you thinking?])

(;B[ef];W[eg]C[Black must choose gote seki only if White is the ko-master.]LB[ba:A];B[ba];W[db]LB[cb:A];B[cb];W[eb]LB[ea:A]LB[df:T]C[If White is ko-master he can force a ko with A. Tenuki with T to see how.]
(;B[ea];W[da]LB[dc:A];B[dc]C[This is the gote seki.])
